gates.summary: PR #72 benchmark gate is satisfied by internal synthetic report-only evidence.
A hosted native-runtime route must be pushed or otherwise reviewable through an approved real Flutter app path.
Physical or observed-host profile evidence remains future work and is not required for PR #72 draft continuation.
Existing memory/allocation exports are report-only and do not support beta/stable memory claims.
Beta/stable approval is intentionally deferred until real-app and benchmark evidence gates are satisfied.
